manifest.name: golden-path-project
manifest.description: Harness Factory draft for: I want a Claude harness with approval, MCP, memory, review, and retry.
manifest.prompt:
I want a Claude harness with approval, MCP, memory, review, and retry.
Requested capabilities: approval, mcp, state, review, retry, subagent
Reference patterns: approval-gate.pre-tool-use, mcp-registration.three-tier, retry-loop.evaluate-mutate, review-loop.evaluate-retry, state-persistence.session-memory, subagent-delegation.role-routing
Confirmed decisions: runtime.target=claude-code; approval-policy=Require approval before destructive filesystem writes, external execution, and credential-changing actions.; mcp-scope=Expose MCP access for project files, reference search, and runtime diagnostics needed by the harness.; acceptance-checks=Run a review loop that checks sandbox success, compatibility warnings, and completion evidence before finishing.; memory-scope=Persist working memory, build state, verification status, and export metadata under the project-local state path.; retry-budget=Retry transient failures up to 2 times, then stop with a localized failure summary and next action.; delegation-plan=Delegate independent research or verification work to bounded subagents with explicit ownership.

# golden-path-project

User intent: I want a Claude harness with approval, MCP, memory, review, and retry.
Requested capabilities: approval, mcp, state, review, retry, subagent
Reference patterns: approval-gate.pre-tool-use, mcp-registration.three-tier, retry-loop.evaluate-mutate, review-loop.evaluate-retry, state-persistence.session-memory, subagent-delegation.role-routing
Confirmed decisions: runtime.target=claude-code; approval-policy=Require approval before destructive filesystem writes, external execution, and credential-changing actions.; mcp-scope=Expose MCP access for project files, reference search, and runtime diagnostics needed by the harness.; acceptance-checks=Run a review loop that checks sandbox success, compatibility warnings, and completion evidence before finishing.; memory-scope=Persist working memory, build state, verification status, and export metadata under the project-local state path.; retry-budget=Retry transient failures up to 2 times, then stop with a localized failure summary and next action.; delegation-plan=Delegate independent research or verification work to bounded subagents with explicit ownership.

## Target runtime
- Claude Code

## Behavior
- Generate a working harness skeleton from intent
- Preserve safety boundaries
- Keep runtime choice explicit before writing runtime-specific artifacts
- Emit trace-friendly execution output

## Safety notes
- Layout is stored separately from semantic graph data.
- Generated harness targets Claude Code for the current authoring lane.
- Confirm enabling elevated runtime or tool permissions for the generated harness.
- Custom blocks are opaque and must be traced at runtime.
